case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,153.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MTN TO VACATE SUMM JUDGMNT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUN-01-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OBJECTION TO MOVING PARTY'S FILING IN VIOLATION OF CCP 1005 (MOTION BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT ,AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY'S MTN TO VACATE SUMM JUDGMNT -- DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-01-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE THE BAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE THE BAIL: GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ALEX SALDAMANDO REPORTER: VALERIE PAPALE, CSR #6899
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-07-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
